data.name: xrTableCell120.ExpressionBindings
data.value: IIF( IsNullOrEmpty([AgeWeek]) OR IsNullOrEmpty([FlockAge]), '', IIF([AgeWeek] <= [FlockAge], IIF(IsNullOrEmpty(?Total), '', ?Total) + ToStr([FlockAge]) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty(?WeeksOfAgeAndBelow), '', ?WeeksOfAgeAndBelow), IIF(IsNullOrEmpty(?TotalAbove), '', ?TotalAbove) + ToStr([FlockAge]) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty(?AgeWeeks), '', ?AgeWeeks) ) )

data.name: Group1.Expression
data.value: IIF( IsNullOrEmpty([GroupByWeek]) OR IsNullOrEmpty([FlockAge]), ' ', IIF([GroupByWeek] = [FlockAge], ToStr([FlockAge]) + ' ' + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty(?WeeksOfAgeAndBelow), ' ', ?WeeksOfAgeAndBelow), ToStr([FlockAge]) + ' ' + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty(?AgeWeeks), '', ?AgeWeeks) + ' ' + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty(?TotalAbove), ' ', ?TotalAbove) ) )

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
